ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein's function */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the protein is derived */,
  "isoform" TEXT /* Isoform of the protein */,
  "is_experimental" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the protein has been experimentally validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localization_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each localization pattern */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein associated with the localization pattern */,
  "cell_cortex" REAL /* Cell cortex localization score */,
  "cellular_bud" REAL /* Cellular bud localization score */,
  "cellular_component" REAL /* Cellular component localization score */,
  "chromosome" REAL /* Chromosome localization score */,
  "cytoplasm" REAL /* Cytoplasm localization score */,
  "cytoplasmic_vesicle" REAL /* Cytoplasmic vesicle localization score */,
  "cytoskeleton" REAL /* Cytoskeleton localization score */,
  "endomembrane_system" REAL /* Endomembrane system localization score */,
  "extracellular_region" REAL /* Extracellular region localization score */,
  "Golgi_apparatus" REAL /* Golgi apparatus localization score */,
  "membrane" REAL /* Membrane localization score */,
  "microtubule_organizing_center" REAL /* Microtubule organizing center localization score */,
  "mitochondrial_envelope" REAL /* Mitochondrial envelope localization score */,
  "mitochondrion" REAL /* Mitochondrion localization score */,
  "nucleolus" REAL /* Nucleolus localization score */,
  "nucleus" REAL /* Nucleus localization score */,
  "other" REAL /* Other localization score */,
  "peroxisome" REAL /* Peroxisome localization score */,
  "ribosome" REAL /* Ribosome localization score */,
  "site_of_polarized_growth" REAL /* Site of polarized growth localization score */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated the localization pattern */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the localization pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_localization_patterns_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data" (
  "genomics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data entry */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein associated with the genomics data */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Official gene ID */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteomics_data" (
  "proteomics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proteomics data entry */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein associated with the proteomics data */,
  "peptide_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the peptide */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the peptide */,
  "post_translational_modifications" TEXT /* Description of post-translational modifications */,
  "isoform_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the specific isoform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proteomics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteomics_data_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein associated with the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., fluorescent, brightfield) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_annotation" TEXT /* Annotation or notes about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the experimental condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the experiment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the experiment */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity during the experiment */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level during the experiment */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Oxygen level during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_proteins" (
  "project_protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-protein association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the protein in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_proteins_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_proteins_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein */,
  "predicted_function" TEXT /* Predicted function of the protein */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used for prediction */,
  "date_of_prediction" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)
